The HTML Maze
by kyrylo

Containment Forsaken Arcaneum

Darkness writhes with hidden life.
AI merges with cosmic agendas.
Symbols whisper hidden dooms.
Madness prices true star sights.
AI heralds doom fusion.

Compass

N S E W
Go North Go South Go East Go West Go Up Go Down

Use the compass to navigate through the maze.
